lesson: Design system tokens had changed from luxury palette to workspace.ae B2B palette. Round-table findings referenced old tokens (gold, sage). Always reconcile findings against current MASTER.md before applying corrections.

Aziz rejected 50/50 split hero. Full-bleed overlay pattern spec written. Gold used only on collection label (Aziz-authorized override of MASTER no-gold rule). Blueprint watermark at 4% opacity corner only — MASTER anti-pattern exemption documented in spec. Always check if prior spec was rejected before building on it.

Homepage spec covers 6 sections: Header, Hero (delta from hero-banner v1.0), Category Navigator, New Arrivals, Trust Signals, Footer. Hero indicators (horizontal lines) and mega menu were not in hero-banner.md v1.0 — addressed in homepage.md as hero delta. Product cards reference MASTER spec directly. E-commerce data is mock per project_ecom_delay.

bg-white] and gray-900] Tailwind typos are pervasive across 8+ files — broken button backgrounds and text colors. Labels not linked to inputs via htmlFor/id in contact-form.tsx. Duplicate skip link rendered in both layout.tsx and header.tsx.
blueprint-overlay.tsx and architectural-background.tsx deleted; hero-banner gradient replaced with flat rgba overlay; section-arch-overlay default color corrected to brand charcoal

Gradient overlays (bg-gradient-to-t) are a brand violation — always use flat bg-black/{opacity}. Dark sections (#0c0c0c) must be inverted to #F5F5F5 or bg-white with border-[#D4D4D4]. CTA buttons and dot indicators must use rounded-none. Hero headings cap at text-4xl (h1 = 36px per DESIGN.md). drop-shadow on headings is not permitted.

target: city landing pages (riyadh, jeddah, dammam, khobar)
lesson: Dark bg-[#0c0c0c] hero/CTA bands violate DESIGN.md; converted to bg-white (hero) and bg-[#F5F5F5] (CTA) with charcoal text. Stats with all-dash placeholders hidden via {false &&} on dammam and khobar.
rgba() border tokens and inline gradient overlays are common drift points — scan for rgba() on each review pass

target: shop, shop/[id], cart, faq, projects, privacy, terms, delivery, warranty, blog, quotation, showrooms, brands pages
lesson: rgba(0,0,0,0.08) borders convert to #D4D4D4; rgba(0,0,0,0.08) on non-border uses (e.g. step number color text-[rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]) convert to #D4D4D4 as visual equivalent; rounded-full on institutional step circles -> rounded-none for B2B aesthetic
